TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Elizabeth II ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Elizabeth II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926 - 2022) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Bahamas ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Barbados ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Belize ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Canada ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Greenland ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Jamaica ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw New zealand ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Papua new guinea ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Saint Kitts and Nevis ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Saint Lucia ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Saint Vincent and the Grenadines ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Solomon Islands ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Tuvalu ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw United kingdom ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: elizaβetħ ii rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, elizaβetħ ii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** - ****) mrħuw antiɣua an* βarβu*a taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw βaħamas~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw βarβa*os~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw βelize taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw ʦ~ʨana*a taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw ɣreenlan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw *amaiʦ~ʨa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw new zealan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw papua new ɣuinea taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw s~ɕaint kitts~ɕ an* ne*is~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw s~ɕaint luʦ~ʨia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw s~ɕaint *inʦ~ʨent an* tħe ɣrena*ines~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw s~ɕolomon is~ɕlan*s~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw tu*alu taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mrħuw unite* kiŋ*om taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ

(minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926 - 2022) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw Bahamas ta' balay ms'rux kya la. mrhuw United kingdom ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
